raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The University of California is one of the most prestigious public university systems in the world.",
    "The admission processes of the University of California should be above reproach and not subject to manipulation by the wealthy and well-connected.",
    "The veto of AB 1215 was discouraging as it aimed to implement protocols to address abuses highlighted during the Varsity Blues scandal.",
    "The University of California has implemented measures to address problems identified during the Varsity Blues scandal and subsequent audits.",
    "The limited reform measures implemented by the University of California were a result of the Varsity Blues investigation and the audits that followed.",
    "Every California student should have the same opportunity to access the University of California, regardless of their connections or financial status."
  ]
}
```
